ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – CI Pipeline Update
ham.body:
Hi team,

I wanted to let you know that the issue with the CI pipeline for the new feature branch has been fixed. After reviewing the logs, I identified that the wrong environment variables were being used during the deployment step. I updated the .github/workflows/ci.yml file to use the correct secrets and added a retry mechanism for the Docker build step.

The pipeline now passes all tests and the build artifact is uploaded to the correct registry. You can view the latest run here: <URL>

Thanks for your patience.

- DevOps Engineer

spam.subject: URGENT: Wallet Suspended – Verify Your Account Now
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet account. As a result, your wallet has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets. To restore access, you must verify your identity immediately.

Click on the link below to verify your account:
<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently disabled and you may lose your funds.

Thank you,
Security Team
